title: Version 0.35.0-nightly Release
description: Released v0.35.0-nightly.20260314 pre-release on March 14, 2026. Also released v0.33.1 with full changelog showing recent updates. New features include agent skills, multi-step workflow automation capabilities, and image pasting with usage analytics features.

title: Student Plan Updates and Agentic Improvements
description: On March 13, 2026, GitHub announced updates to GitHub Copilot for students, moving those with GitHub Education benefits to the new GitHub Copilot Student plan. Premium models have been removed from the free student plan. On March 11, 2026, major improvements to agentic capabilities were released for GitHub Copilot in JetBrains IDEs, including custom agentic capabilities, UX refinements, and quality updates. Also introduced Figma integration allowing users to connect to the Figma MCP server.

community_feedback.quote: They nerf'd the options and the best models are no longer free
GitHub stated the changes are to 'make student access sustainable'

title: GPT-5.4 and Performance Improvements
description: On March 12, 2026, released version 1.9577.27 with a fix for Apple M5. On March 9, 2026, version 1.9577.24 included Cascade improvements (fix for dangling Diff Zones in Jupyter Notebooks, improved Jupyter Notebook performance on WSL, improved Cascade UI rendering performance), MCP enhancements (system-level Skill definitions via MDM for Enterprise), and stability improvements for autocomplete and SSH/Remote performance. On March 5, 2026, announced GPT-5.4 availability with promotional pricing.

community_feedback.quote: Decent with Medium reasoning. Going above I believe it's confusing itself and simply doesn't work
Still considered 'surprisingly cheap' compared to alternatives like Opus

title: Minor Bug Fixes and Performance Improvements
description: On March 7, 2026, released minor bug fixes and improvements along with various bug fixes, performance improvements, and visual polish across the platform. Cognition also announced a new Devin Agent Preview with Claude Sonnet 4.5 integration that is 2x faster and 12% better on Jr. Developer Evaluations.

title: Cursor 2.6 - MCP Apps and Team Marketplaces
description: Released version 2.6 on March 3, 2026, introducing MCP Apps (interactive UIs in agent chats), Team Marketplaces for Plugins (enabling teams to share private plugins), and debug mode improvements. On March 5, 2026, Cursor announced the Automations feature for building always-on AI agents triggered by Slack, Linear, GitHub, PagerDuty, and webhooks. On March 11, 2026, added 30+ new plugins from major partners including Atlassian, Datadog, GitLab, Glean, Hugging Face, monday.com, and PlanetScale.

community_feedback.quote: Cursor is rolling out a new system for agentic coding with automations that can automatically launch agents within your workflow

title: MCP Elicitation and Performance Improvements
description: Added MCP elicitation support allowing MCP servers to request structured input mid-task via interactive dialog. Added new Elicitation and ElicitationResult hooks, -n/--name CLI flag for session naming, worktree sparse paths setting, PostCompact hook, /effort slash command, and session quality survey. Fixed numerous issues including deferred tools losing schemas, plan mode re-approval, voice mode keypress issues, and various memory leaks. Improved startup performance, background agent behavior, and model fallback notifications.

community_feedback.quote: A landmark developer survey crowned Claude Code as the most-used AI coding assistant

title: Codex App 26.312 - Themes and Revamped Automations
description: Released Codex app version 26.312 in March 2026, introducing Themes feature, revamped Automations, and performance improvements with bug fixes. Version 26.311 also released with new features and performance improvements.
